title: Sure Thermal Neck & Shoulder Heat Pack
features: Thermal neck & shoulder heat pack for a soothing aromatherapy
Fleece covered for comfort and style
Natural silica bead filling as an improved alternative to wheat based products
Microwave for soothing warmth or freeze for a relieving cold compress
Colour may vary between blue and pink
description: Product description The new Sure Thermal fleece covered soothing aromatherapy neck & shoulder heat pack feature a natural silica bead filling as an improved alternative to wheat based products. This natural and proven thermal alternative gives a more hygienic and longer lasting product that is more suited to regular microwave heating and cooling cycles. The range has been carefully made to comply with BS8433:2004 (Microwaveable Personal Warmers). The bead filling is silicon dioxide, an abundant, harmless natural element forming quartz and widely used in its powdered form as a food additive (anti-caking agent E551). Microwave for soothing warmth or freeze for a relieving cold compress. Indications Neck Pain Relief, Aromatherapy Directions Microwave for heat or freeze for cold See more
